ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the school belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the school (e.g., NCAA I, NCAA II, NCAA III) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "DOB" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_season_stats" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the player was active */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the player (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of double-doubles achieved */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Number of triple-doubles achieved */,
  "forty_points" INTEGER /* Number of games where the player scored 40 or more points */,
  "twenty_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of games where the player had 20 or more rebounds */,
  "twenty_assists" INTEGER /* Number of games where the player had 20 or more assists */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of technical fouls */,
  "hob" REAL /* Hob (Hands On Ball) metric */,
  "assists_per_turnover" REAL /* Assists per turnover ratio */,
  "steals_per_turnover" REAL /* Steals per turnover ratio */,
  "free_throws_per_field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Free throws attempted per field goal attempts */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage for the team */,
  "offensive_win_shares" REAL /* Offensive win shares */,
  "defensive_win_shares" REAL /* Defensive win shares */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Total win shares */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_season_stats_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_career_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "double_doubles" INTEGER /* Total number of double-doubles achieved */,
  "triple_doubles" INTEGER /* Total number of triple-doubles achieved */,
  "forty_points" INTEGER /* Total number of games where the player scored 40 or more points */,
  "twenty_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total number of games where the player had 20 or more rebounds */,
  "twenty_assists" INTEGER /* Total number of games where the player had 20 or more assists */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Total number of technical fouls */,
  "hob" REAL /* Hob (Hands On Ball) metric */,
  "assists_per_turnover" REAL /* Assists per turnover ratio */,
  "steals_per_turnover" REAL /* Steals per turnover ratio */,
  "free_throws_per_field_goal_attempts" REAL /* Free throws attempted per field goal attempts */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins for the player’s teams */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Total number of losses for the player’s teams */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Total win percentage for the player’s teams */,
  "offensive_win_shares" REAL /* Total offensive win shares */,
  "defensive_win_shares" REAL /* Total defensive win shares */,
  "win_shares" REAL /* Total win shares */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points per game */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game */,
  "turnovers_per_game" REAL /* Turnovers per game */,
  "career_length" INTEGER /* Length of the player’s career in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_career_stats_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
